overview: Yeti is a SubBoss-class Beast monster found in Ice Cavern. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 750 HP, 25 physical damage, 130 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 999, MaxImpactEndurance 999. 4 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Run Attack at 190% ratio (475 base damage). Sight range 1000, combat radius 140. Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilityy: Jump Attack.

phases.name: Melee Combat
phases.description: 4 melee attacks. Attack1 (140%), Attack2 (150%), Run Attack (190%), and more.

phases.name: Rush / Charge
phases.description: 1 rush/charge attacks for gap-closing. Jump Attack (190%).

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

strategies.title: High Impact Values (ImpactRes 999, Endurance 999)
strategies.description: ImpactResistance 999 and MaxImpactEndurance 999. This monster does not have a Staggered ability in its ability set.

strategies.title: Elemental Weakness: Fire
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Fire (-2000). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Resists: Ice
strategies.description: Elemental resistances: Ice (+500). Positive reduction values reduce incoming damage of that type.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 200
strategies.description: Has 200 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Nightmare Gains: Jump Attack
strategies.description: Nightmare grade has 1 exclusive abilities not present in lower grades: Jump Attack. These change the fight dynamics in Nightmare.

strategies.title: Detection Range: 1000 units
strategies.description: Sight radius 1000 units, loses target at 1600 units, 180° vision angle.

strategies.title: Combat Range: combat area radius 140, ability check distance 300
strategies.description: Combat area radius 140. Ability check distance 300.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 70 in Elite — attacks animate faster
ActionSpeed 0 → 100 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster
Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilities: Jump Attack

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.stuck_description: Has stuck-detection failsafes in behavior tree.
ai_perception.sight_description: Detects targets within 1000 units. Loses target at 1600 units.
